name: rubber-duck-for-codex
description: Rubber-duck dialogue skills for pressure-testing Codex reasoning.

interface.shortDescription: Pressure-test Codex reasoning with partner dialogue.
interface.longDescription: Rubber Duck For Codex adds two skills: one to run a bounded rubber-duck dialogue before non-trivial responses, and one to act as the partner that checks drafts, decisions, evidence, and user-request fulfillment.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use rubber-duck dialogue to pressure-test this response.
